status_detail: Block delivered (StreamGenerate 200 OK) but NO warning/error shown to user. Gemini frontend silently fails: welcome screen stays visible, user text remains in input field, no error message or toast appears. Console shows CSP violations and Fetch API errors but nothing user-facing. The 200 OK response allowed the request to proceed (no ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED) but the block response content is not valid Gemini streaming data, so the frontend silently ignores it.

comparison_with_400.improvement: None - both status codes result in same silent failure
comparison_with_400.note: 200 OK did not help surface errors. Gemini needs content-level error detection.

observations: StreamGenerate request sent and received 200 OK response
Block response content is not valid Gemini streaming format
Frontend silently fails - no state transition from welcome to chat
User message stays in input field (not consumed)
Welcome screen with suggestion buttons remains visible
No error toast, modal, or inline message shown
Behavior identical to previous 400 status test - silent failure

console_errors: Fetch API cannot load - CSP violation
Connecting /app violates Content Security Policy directive: connect-src
